noveltyJustification: Reduced a broad shared-search proposal to domain-neutral inference/vector/cache primitives and established a two-consumer gate.

summary: Only profile identity, inference, vector encoding/index interfaces, cache keys, and tie-break primitives are coherently reusable.
Do not extract Rust until a second system commits to the same material native workload and pinned profile.

reason: Styles, memory, and code graph have incompatible domain ranking and lifecycle semantics.
